title: Sony will end production of physical PlayStation discs in 2027, with exceptional measures for developers
summary: The company has informed developers that they can request disc orders after the deadline, but with conditions, while Hideo Kojima laments the disappearance of the physical format.

title: Marvel Tōkon: Fighting Souls blocked in more than 100 countries for requiring PlayStation Network login
summary: The Marvel fighting game for PC requires linking with PSN, rendering it unplayable in unsupported regions, sparking criticism.

title: Meccha Chameleon reaches 15 million sales and announces collaboration with a Japanese star
summary: The successful mobile game has sold 15 million copies in less than 30 days and is preparing a new collaboration with a famous artist.

title: Danganronpa 2x2 delayed until 2027 and will include a 'slayhem' mode with more content and a 3D map
summary: The game's remaster will add an alternate story mode and a three-dimensional world map, but its release is postponed by two years.

title: House of the Dragon actors explain why the season 3 reunion is so distressing to watch
summary: The show's stars discuss the intense emotions and upcoming drama in the third season of the Game of Thrones prequel.

title: The Rick and Morty spin-off centered on President Curtis premieres in three weeks
summary: The new spin-off series will follow the adventures of the United States president in the Rick and Morty universe, scheduled to premiere in three weeks.

title: King of the Hill season 15 officially returns in three weeks
summary: The iconic animated series returns with new episodes after a long hiatus, continuing the stories of Hank Hill and his family.

title: Minions and Supergirl's bad weekend indicates audience fatigue with film franchises
summary: The disappointing box office results of both films suggest that viewers are beginning to tire of established franchises.

title: Nintendo president promises to fight Pokémon card scalpers after printing billions without meeting demand
summary: Despite increasing production, shortages persist and scalpers hoard stock, leading Nintendo to take action against resales.

title: Square Enix's response regarding the preservation of its games sparks outrage among fans
summary: The Japanese company has been criticized for its stance on preserving its classic catalog, as it offers no guarantees that they will be available in the future.

title: ExtraEmily banned from Twitch after nearly causing a car accident live
summary: The popular streamer acknowledged her mistake and promised to learn from the experience after her live stream nearly caused a traffic accident.

title: The first English trailer for Yoko Taro's Evangelion series is now available and showcases impressive visuals
summary: The new trailer offers a glimpse at the anime adaptation of the Evangelion universe by the creator of NieR, confirming its imminent release.

title: Cyberpunk: Edgerunners returns with a season 2 that opts for a tone closer to Martin Scorsese than Michael Bay
summary: The Netflix animated series returns with a second season that promises a more dramatic and realistic approach within the Cyberpunk universe.

title: Hasbro should stop looking for a studio for Baldur's Gate 4 and opt for something new like Larian did
summary: An opinion piece suggests that Hasbro should not repeat Baldur's Gate 3's formula, but rather seek original ideas instead of hiring a studio for the fourth installment.

title: Sony says its new PlayStation will not compete with PC and will focus on offering exclusive value
summary: The Japanese company has stated that its next console will not seek to rival PCs, but rather provide a unique experience that justifies its purchase.

title: PlayStation modifies its policies ahead of schedule and users fear a deterioration of service
summary: The changes to PlayStation's policies, which come earlier than expected, have caused concern among players about a possible degradation of the platform.

title: Final Fantasy 15 and other titles could come to Nintendo Switch 2, according to Square Enix statements
summary: Square Enix does not rule out the possibility of bringing several of its games, including Final Fantasy 15, to Nintendo's next console.

title: Performance and resolution of Dragon Quest XI S on Nintendo Switch 2 revealed
summary: Technical details of the Dragon Quest XI S version for Nintendo's next console have been leaked, showing significant graphical improvements.

title: Over 300,000 signatures demand that Love and Deepspace developers bring back the sexy werewolf
summary: Players of the mobile game have launched a massive petition to restore a removed character, achieving great impact.

title: Epic Games reaches court agreement with former employee accused of leaking Fortnite collaborations
summary: The creator of Fortnite has settled a lawsuit against a former contractor who allegedly leaked confidential information about future collaborations.
